description:
Analyze the historical power data from the 'use' feed (tag: 'Home') to calculate the daily energy consumption in kWh for the last 7 complete UTC days (excluding today). 

Starting from the Emoncms dashboard, identify the 'use' feed. Retrieve its historical data via the API or by exporting it. Calculate the total energy (kWh) for each of the previous 7 days (00:00:00 to 23:59:59 UTC). 

Save the result as a JSON file to `/home/ga/daily_usage_report.json` with the following structure:
